projectDescription: A quest progress tracker for Escape from Tarkov helping players achieve the Kappa container
keyFeatures: Quest progress tracking with Kappa container visualization
Smart task recommendations based on downstream impact and map batching
Interactive map tools with custom pins and shareable presets
Hideout station management with item inventory tracking
Item price tiers and usage tracking across tasks and crafts
QR code-based progress sharing and import/export
publicApiSurface: Tasks page (quest list, flow view, filtering by trader/map/status)
Map page (2D/3D maps, custom pins, preset management)
Hideout page (station grid, item requirements, craft list)
Items page (price tiers, task usage, barter/craft info)
Settings (player level, data export/import, QR sharing, wipe reset)
Database operations (profile, progress, notes, pins, hideout inventory)
Domain logic (unlock calculations, Kappa progress, task recommendations)
Zustand stores (filter state, profile state, tier settings, now pins)
GraphQL API integration (tasks, maps, traders, hideout, items)
